raw_consumer_statement:
On XXXX XXXX XXXX, I stayed at the XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX for work. The room and taxes ( {$120.00} ) were prepaid in advance through my employers travel agency, XXXX XXXX XXXX, and charged to a corporate XXXX  card ( last four digits visible on the invoice ). 

At check-in, I provided my personal Citi card only to cover {$20.00} for parking. 

However, the hotel charged my Citi card {$140.00} ( room + taxes + parking ). This resulted in a duplicate charge for the room and taxes that were already prepaid. 

I submitted the following to Citi : XXXX XXXX XXXX showing the hotel confirmation number, dates, and prepaid {$120.00} on the corporate XXXX  ( balance {$0.00} ) XXXX XXXX showing {$140.00} charged to my Citi card for the same reservation and dates Written explanation clarifying that only {$20.00} parking should have been billed to my Citi card I also spoke with dispute supervisors, and was told my documentation was sufficient and the charge would be corrected. Instead, the dispute was denied, reopened, and denied again. It has been over two months and the issue is still unresolved despite providing all evidence requested. 

I am requesting assistance reversing the duplicate {$120.00} room/tax charge and leaving only the valid {$20.00} parking charge.
